payload.name: exec_command
payload.arguments:
{"cmd":"AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY='REDACTED' ssh -i .private_notes/gate-tpa-azure azureuser@20.67.109.244 'bash -s' <<'REMOTE'
set -euo pipefail
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y python3-venv nginx certbot python3-certbot-nginx
python3 -m venv /opt/gate-ai-agent/.venv
/opt/gate-ai-agent/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip
/opt/gate-ai-agent/.venv/bin/pip install -r /opt/gate-ai-agent/requirements.txt
sudo tee /etc/gate-ai-agent.env >/dev/null <<EOF
AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT=https://gate-tpa-openai.openai.azure.com
AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY=${AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY}
AZURE_OPENAI_REALTIME_DEPLOYMENT=gate-realtime
REDACTED
GATE_AI_AGENT_NAME=Gate
GATE_AI_AGENT_VOICE=verse
PORT=8000
EOF
sudo chmod 0600 /etc/gate-ai-agent.env
sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/gate-ai-agent.service >/dev/null <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Gate AI Agent webhook service
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
WorkingDirectory=/opt/gate-ai-agent
EnvironmentFile=/etc/gate-ai-agent.env
ExecStart=/opt/gate-ai-agent/.venv/bin/gunicorn --bind 127.0.0.1:8000 app:app
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
User=azureuser
Group=azureuser

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
sudo tee /etc/nginx/sites-available/gate-ai-agent >/dev/null <<'EOF'
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name gate-tpa-pbx-tw4wpyjbwbhpa.westeurope.cloudapp.azure.com;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8000;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}
EOF
sudo ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/gate-ai-agent /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/gate-ai-agent
sudo rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now gate-ai-agent
sudo systemctl restart gate-ai-agent nginx
sudo certbot --nginx -d gate-tpa-pbx-tw4wpyjbwbhpa.westeurope.cloudapp.azure.com --non-interactive --agree-tos -m nikolas@zone01.gr --redirect
systemctl is-active gate-ai-agent
systemctl is-active nginx
REMOTE","workdir":"/home/agxos/.local/src/gate-app","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":22000}

payload.message: The package install succeeded, but the remote env-file write failed because SSH did not forward the local `AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY` variable. I’m writing the VM env file explicitly now and restarting the service/proxy.

content.text: The package install succeeded, but the remote env-file write failed because SSH did not forward the local `AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY` variable. I’m writing the VM env file explicitly now and restarting the service/proxy.

payload.name: exec_command
payload.arguments:
{"cmd":"ssh -i .private_notes/gate-tpa-azure azureuser@20.67.109.244 'bash -s' <<'REMOTE'
set -euo pipefail
sudo tee /etc/gate-ai-agent.env >/dev/null <<'EOF'
AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT=https://gate-tpa-openai.openai.azure.com
REDACTED
AZURE_OPENAI_REALTIME_DEPLOYMENT=gate-realtime
REDACTED
GATE_AI_AGENT_NAME=Gate
GATE_AI_AGENT_VOICE=verse
PORT=8000
EOF
sudo chmod 0600 /etc/gate-ai-agent.env
sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/gate-ai-agent.service >/dev/null <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Gate AI Agent webhook service
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
WorkingDirectory=/opt/gate-ai-agent
EnvironmentFile=/etc/gate-ai-agent.env
ExecStart=/opt/gate-ai-agent/.venv/bin/gunicorn --bind 127.0.0.1:8000 app:app
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
User=azureuser
Group=azureuser

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
sudo tee /etc/nginx/sites-available/gate-ai-agent >/dev/null <<'EOF'
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name gate-tpa-pbx-tw4wpyjbwbhpa.westeurope.cloudapp.azure.com;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8000;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}
EOF
sudo ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/gate-ai-agent /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/gate-ai-agent
sudo rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now gate-ai-agent
sudo systemctl restart gate-ai-agent nginx
sudo certbot --nginx -d gate-tpa-pbx-tw4wpyjbwbhpa.westeurope.cloudapp.azure.com --non-interactive --agree-tos -m nikolas@zone01.gr --redirect
systemctl is-active gate-ai-agent
systemctl is-active nginx
REMOTE","workdir":"/home/agxos/.local/src/gate-app","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":16000}

content.text:
Implemented the Gate AI Agent SIP integration scaffold.

What is live now:
- Azure OpenAI resource created: `gate-tpa-openai` in `swedencentral`
- Webhook service deployed on the PBX VM behind HTTPS:
  `https://gate-tpa-pbx-tw4wpyjbwbhpa.westeurope.cloudapp.azure.com/webhook`
- Health endpoint works:
  `https://gate-tpa-pbx-tw4wpyjbwbhpa.westeurope.cloudapp.azure.com/healthz`
- Azure OpenAI webhook endpoint registered for `realtime.call.incoming`
- Asterisk route added:
  - Dial `9001` to route to Azure OpenAI Realtime SIP
  - Azure SIP URI uses `proj_3bf3b9942812477980c40f1948d6b247@swedencentral.sip.ai.azure.com;transport=tls`
- Extension `1008` added as `Gate AI Agent`

Repo changes pushed:
- Commit: `86b0a8b Add Gate AI realtime SIP webhook`
- Added [src/gate_ai_agent/app.py](/home/agxos/.local/src/gate-app/src/gate_ai_agent/app.py)
- Added [src/gate_ai_agent/requirements.txt](/home/agxos/.local/src/gate-app/src/gate_ai_agent/requirements.txt)
- Updated [infra/cloud-init/asterisk.yaml](/home/agxos/.local/src/gate-app/infra/cloud-init/asterisk.yaml)
- Updated [infra/main.bicep](/home/agxos/.local/src/gate-app/infra/main.bicep)
- Updated [infra/README.md](/home/agxos/.local/src/gate-app/infra/README.md)

Current blocker:
Azure realtime model deployment is blocked by quota. Both `swedencentral` and `eastus2` show `0` RPM quota for all `gpt-realtime*` GlobalStandard models, so `gate-realtime` could not be created yet. Once quota is granted, deploy `gpt-realtime-1.5` or `gpt-realtime-mini` as `gate-realtime`, and the webhook acceptance path should become usable.

References used:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/how-to/realtime-audio-sip
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/how-to/webhooks
